title: MismatchAssessmentEvent (Events v1)
description: Structured assessment produced from mismatches + feedback.

scope.description: Opaque scope selector for governance workflows.

diagnosisNeeded.description: Derived boolean steering Adaptation: true when a diagnosis/control-performance assessment should run.

repeatDiagnosis.description: Derived boolean steering Adaptation loop iteration: true while diagnosis should be repeated.

candidateRuleId.description: Optional candidate BehavioralRule id produced during assessment.

candidateRuleStatus.description: Derived status of the candidate BehavioralRule used by Adaptation controls (e.g., "PUBLISHED").

waitingForRealization.description: Derived boolean steering provisioning loop: true while waiting for the candidate rule to be realized in the State plane.
